summary: Iteration 26 - Testing new LottoLab features: Payment status (PAID/UNPAID) for winning tickets, Bet limits for Loto4/Loto5, Fiches Jouées endpoint, and 60/20/10 payout logic. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend preview URL unavailable (external environment issue), but code review confirms correct implementation.
critical_code_review_comments: FichesJoueesPage.jsx has ESLint warning: useEffect missing dependency 'fetchTickets' - minor issue, not blocking

success_rate.frontend: Unable to test via preview URL (environment issue) - code review confirms correct implementation

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 26 features are working correctly. Backend APIs tested: 1) GET/PUT /api/company/winning-tickets with payment_status filter, 2) PUT /api/company/winning-tickets/{id}/payment-status, 3) GET/PUT /api/company/bet-limits (Loto4=20 HTG, Loto5=250 HTG), 4) GET /api/company/admin/fiches-jouees, 5) GET/PUT /api/supervisor/winning-tickets with payment_status. Frontend components have proper data-testid attributes. Preview URL was unavailable during testing but localhost:3000 confirmed working.

company_winning_tickets.details: GET /api/company/winning-tickets returns tickets with payment_status, paid_count, pending_count. Filter by payment_status=PAID and payment_status=UNPAID working.

company_payment_status_update.details: PUT /api/company/winning-tickets/{id}/payment-status correctly validates PAID/UNPAID values and returns 404 for non-existent tickets.

company_bet_limits.details: GET /api/company/bet-limits returns loto4_max_limit=20.0 and loto5_max_limit=250.0. PUT endpoint updates limits correctly.

fiches_jouees.details: GET /api/company/admin/fiches-jouees returns tickets with stats (total, active, deleted, winners). Period filter (today/week/month) and status filter (all/active/deleted/winner) working.

supervisor_winning_tickets.details: GET /api/supervisor/winning-tickets returns winning tickets for supervisor's agents with payment_status filter support.

supervisor_payment_status_update.details: PUT /api/supervisor/winning-tickets/{id}/payment-status validates PAID/UNPAID and returns 404 for non-existent tickets.

payout_logic_60_20_10.details: Code review confirms 60/20/10 payout multipliers implemented in winning_routes.py: 1st=60x, 2nd=20x, 3rd=10x for Borlette/Loto3.

ticket_check_endpoint.details: POST /api/tickets/check returns 404 for non-existent tickets with proper error message.

api_endpoints_verified: POST /api/auth/login - Company Admin login with admin@lotopam.com/Admin123!
GET /api/company/winning-tickets - Returns winning tickets with payment_status
GET /api/company/bet-limits - Returns Loto4 (20 HTG) and Loto5 (250 HTG) limits
GET /api/company/admin/fiches-jouees - Returns played tickets with stats
GET /api/supervisor/winning-tickets - Returns supervisor's agents winning tickets
notes: Preview URL (https://seller-commission-ui.preview.emergentagent.com) showed 'Preview Unavailable' - external environment issue
Frontend running correctly on localhost:3000 as confirmed by curl test
All backend APIs working correctly on localhost:8001
Frontend components (SupervisorLotsGagnants.jsx, CompanyLotsGagnants.jsx) have proper data-testid attributes for testing
60/20/10 payout logic correctly implemented in winning_routes.py
